steps.title: Set up the angle relationship
steps.content: Each obtuse angle is supplementary to the acute, so obtuse $=180-(7x-410)$. The sum of one acute and three obtuse equals $$(7x-410)+3[180-(7x-410)] = 540 - 2(7x-410).$$

steps.title: Solve for the requested measure
steps.content: Simplify: $540 - 14x + 820 = -14x + 1360$. Matching $-14x+w$ gives $$w = 1360.$$ The answer is 1360.
